Value: Browser back button after logout allows access to the inventory page

After a user logs out from SauceDemo pressing the browser Back button navigates back to /inventory.html without requiring re-authentication. This is a session management vulnerability. In a production application this would be a Critical security defect as it exposes authenticated content to unauthenticated access. Directly observed during test execution.
3. Confirm successful redirection to the Inventory page
6. Confirm redirection to the Login page
After logout the browser Back button should not navigate to /inventory.html. Any access to authenticated pages should redirect back to login. Session token should be invalidated upon logout.
Browser navigates back to /inventory.html and the full inventory page is displayed including all products and navigation - without requiring re-authentication.
TC-038 - Browser back button post-logout - FAILED
